queue.title: Create hooks/lib/timeout-wrapper.sh for standard hook timeout behavior
queue.description: The pattern for fixing slow hooks is well-established: per-check timeout N, parallel background jobs, hook-level watchdog, graceful fallback. Create a shared library that any hook can source to get standard timeout+watchdog behavior with minimal boilerplate.

queue.description: Extend computeBCostTrend pattern to E and R session types. E threshold $1.50, R threshold $2.00. Reuse same arrow/threshold logic from audit-stats.mjs. Output per-type cost trends in audit report alongside existing B cost trend.
